trigger: Installing a persistent LaunchAgent or background service
rule: Always ask Mukul before running 'launchctl load' or installing a new persistent service. Writing the plist file is fine; loading it requires explicit permission. The auto-mode classifier will (correctly) deny without a permission rule.
why: On 2026-05-22 the classifier denied loading com.mukuls.hermes-executor.plist as 'Unauthorized Persistence' — that's the right call. Mukul saying 'fix it' is not blanket authorization for persistent services.

sources.user_correction: On 2026-05-22 the classifier denied loading com.mukuls.hermes-executor.plist as 'Unauthorized Persistence' — that's the right call. Mukul saying 'fix it' is not blanket authorization for persistent services.
